verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Life is easy, when you're up on the mountain And you've got peace of mind, like you've never known But things change when you're down in the valley Don't lose faith, for you're never alone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: For the God on the mountain, is still God in the valley When things go wrong, He'll make them right And the God of the good times, is still God in the bad times The God of the day is still God in the night

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You talk of faith when you're up on the mountain But talk comes so easy when life's at it's best Now it's down in the valleys, of trials and temptations That's where your faith, is really put to the test

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: The God of the day, is still God in the night
